title: 刺々美との絆・酔えばあんし～ん？

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: No worries...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my way back from my first shrine visit of the
year, I happen to hear indistinct mumbling
coming from the side of the street.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: No worries at aaall...
choice_data_list: Sasami? What are you doing in an igloo?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, <username>?! Is that
really you?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Sniff! You've got to help me! I'm about to die from the cold!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Gulp, gulp... Ahhh! That brought me right back from the brink! ☆ It really isn't New Year's without some food and a swig of hot amazake to wash it down with! ♪
choice_data_list: So how did you end up out there?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, you see, I gave my master a little friendly
poke in the derriere with a needle as a way to
liven up the new year...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
But I failed miserably and got kicked out!
Teehee! ☆
choice_data_list: Ah, I see. Just like always, then.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Give me a break! Stop talking like I always fail! Hic!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I may not look it, but even I nail the treatment
sometimes!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Let me prove it to you right now! ☆ Just think of
it as my New Year's gift to you! ♪ M'kay?
choice_data_list:
I'm not receiving treatment from someone who's
obviously drunk!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I scramble to put myself a safe distance from her,
but she quickly blocks my only escape path!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, come onnn! ♪ Name a chakra you want
activated, and I'll get down to business! Lesh go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I guess I have no choice but to grin and bear with
it!
choice_data_list: I-I'll go with the health chakra...
Maybe something like the charm chakra?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Aaall righty! ☆ Ready, steady, hic!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Annnd poke!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Puncture Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Overwhelming power surges through every single
pore of my body, and I feel much more
clearheaded. The treatment is a resounding
success!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Hic... Well, am I da best or whaaat?
choice_data_list: You truly are incredible, Sasa... Oh.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Snrk! Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I carry her snoozing form to the sofa, I
entertain the thought that maybe, just maybe,
she's a better acupuncturist when inebriated.
